name: Personal Website
description: A warm, editorial personal website with hero, about, blog posts, and contact sections.

fields.label: Your Name (Nav Logo)
fields.hint: Name shown in the top-left of the navigation bar.

fields.label: Status Badge
fields.hint: Small badge shown above the headline.

fields.label: Hero Headline
fields.hint: The large headline in the hero section.

fields.label: Hero Tagline
fields.placeholder: I write about technology, design, and the internet.
fields.defaultValue: I write about technology, design, and the internet. Occasional photographer. Always curious.
fields.hint: Short description below the hero headline.

fields.label: About Headline
fields.placeholder: A person who loves ideas & words.
fields.defaultValue: A person who loves ideas & words.
fields.hint: The main heading in the About section.

fields.label: About Bio (First paragraph)
fields.placeholder: I'm a writer and creative based in New York...
fields.defaultValue: I'm a writer and creative based in New York. I've spent the last several years exploring the intersection of technology and human experience — in long-form essays, short stories, and everything in between.
fields.hint: First paragraph of your about section.

fields.label: About Bio (Second paragraph)
fields.placeholder: When I'm not writing, you'll find me...
fields.defaultValue: When I'm not writing, you'll find me at a farmers market, hiking somewhere with bad cell service, or arguing about semicolons.
fields.hint: Second paragraph of your about section.

fields.label: Stat 1 — Number
fields.hint: The number for your first stat.

fields.label: Stat 1 — Label
fields.hint: Label below the first stat number.

fields.label: Stat 2 — Number
fields.hint: The number for your second stat.

fields.label: Stat 2 — Label
fields.hint: Label below the second stat number.

fields.label: Stat 3 — Number
fields.hint: The number for your third stat.

fields.label: Stat 3 — Label
fields.hint: Label below the third stat number.

fields.label: Stat 4 — Number
fields.hint: The number for your fourth stat.

fields.label: Stat 4 — Label
fields.hint: Label below the fourth stat number.

fields.label: Writing Section Heading
fields.hint: Heading shown above the blog posts.

fields.label: Post 1 — Tag
fields.hint: Tag/category for the first post.

fields.label: Post 1 — Title
fields.placeholder: Why Slow Tech is the Future
fields.defaultValue: Why Slow Tech is the Future
fields.hint: Title of the first blog post.

fields.label: Post 1 — Excerpt
fields.placeholder: A meditation on the value of deliberate slowness...
fields.defaultValue: A meditation on the value of deliberate slowness in an age of instant everything.
fields.hint: Short excerpt for the first post.

fields.label: Post 1 — Date
fields.hint: Publication date for the first post.

fields.label: Post 2 — Tag
fields.hint: Tag/category for the second post.

fields.label: Post 2 — Title
fields.hint: Title of the second blog post.

fields.label: Post 2 — Excerpt
fields.defaultValue: How breaking the grid intentionally creates more human-feeling design systems.
fields.hint: Short excerpt for the second post.

fields.label: Post 2 — Date
fields.hint: Publication date for the second post.

fields.label: Post 3 — Tag
fields.hint: Tag/category for the third post.

fields.label: Post 3 — Title
fields.hint: Title of the third blog post.

fields.label: Post 3 — Excerpt
fields.placeholder: The case for going deep into one thing...
fields.defaultValue: The case for going deep into one thing rather than skimming across many.
fields.hint: Short excerpt for the third post.

fields.label: Post 3 — Date
fields.hint: Publication date for the third post.

fields.label: Contact Heading
fields.hint: Main heading in the contact section.

fields.label: Contact Description
fields.placeholder: Whether it's a project, collaboration, or just a nice note...
fields.defaultValue: Whether it's a project, collaboration, or just a nice note — my inbox is always open. I try to respond within a day or two.
fields.hint: Paragraph text below the contact heading.

fields.label: Email Address
fields.hint: Your email address shown in the contact section.

fields.label: Footer Copyright
fields.hint: Copyright text in the footer.
